panel_storage.what_to_expect: One flat rate covers the full season — no monthly billing, no surprises
panel_storage.tier_note2: Need storage outside the standard season? Call us — we're happy to work something out.

steps.title: Drop-Off
steps.description: Bring your vehicle to us or we come to you — pickup is included.

steps.title: Intake
steps.description: We document your vehicle's condition and assign your storage area.

steps.title: Secure Storage
steps.description: Your vehicle stays in our secure, lit barn with camera coverage.

steps.title: Spring Pickup
steps.description: Call to arrange a time and date for pickup or drop-off that works for you.

panel_storage.best_for: Anyone needing secure, worry-free off-season storage
panel_storage.tier_note: Small: Snowmobiles, ATVs, Jet Skis · Medium: Boats up to 20ft · Large: Boats 20–28ft · Extra Large: 28ft+ & RVs

steps.title: Reach Out
steps.description: Call or email us with what you have in mind.

steps.title: We'll Assess
steps.description: If we can accommodate it, we'll give you a straight answer and a quote.

steps.title: Get It Done
steps.description: We handle it while your vehicle is in our care.

panel_custom.best_for: Anything not covered above — ask and we'll figure it out
panel_custom.what_to_expect: An honest answer about whether we can help and what it costs

page_sub: Seasonal storage, winterization, shrink wrap, cleaning, and more.
cta_sub: Reach out today and we'll get back to you within 24 hours.

panel_winterize.descriptor: Full Off-Season Prep · Storage Customers Only

steps.title: Engine Fogging
steps.description: Protective oil fogged into the engine to prevent corrosion during storage.

steps.title: Antifreeze Treatment
steps.description: Antifreeze pumped through water passages to protect against Michigan winters.

steps.title: Battery Disconnect
steps.description: Battery is safely disconnected to preserve its charge.

panel_winterize.price_range: Typical range: $50–$150 depending on vessel size
panel_winterize.best_for: Boat owners who want full protection handled for them
panel_winterize.what_to_expect: We handle everything — your boat goes in ready for winter, comes out ready to launch

sidebar_note: Add-on services available to storage customers only.

steps.title: Schedule
steps.description: Contact us a few days before you need pickup or delivery.

steps.title: We Come to You
steps.description: We arrive at your location with the right equipment to haul your vehicle.

steps.title: Transport
steps.description: Your vehicle is safely transported to or from our facility.

steps.title: Confirmation
steps.description: We confirm arrival and condition at both ends of the trip.

panel_pickup.best_for: Anyone who doesn't want the hassle of trailering at season start and end
panel_pickup.what_to_expect: Give us a few days notice and we handle the rest
panel_pickup.service_area: Pickup and drop-off is included free within a 20-mile radius of our facility. Outside that range, we can still make it work — just give us a call and we'll sort out the details.

steps.title: Assessment
steps.description: We assess your vehicle's condition and discuss what's needed.

steps.title: Scheduling
steps.description: Work is scheduled and completed while your vehicle is in storage.

steps.title: Updates
steps.description: We contact you with any findings or questions before proceeding.

steps.title: Completion
steps.description: Work completed and documented before your seasonal pickup.

panel_maintenance.price_range: Basic tune-ups from $50 — larger repairs quoted individually
panel_maintenance.best_for: Minor mechanical issues or seasonal tune-ups between storage periods
panel_maintenance.what_to_expect: Convenient — your vehicle gets serviced while it's already here

panel_wash.descriptor: Before or After Storage · Storage Customers Only

steps.title: Exterior Wash
steps.description: Full wash down to remove dirt, algae, and water deposits.

steps.title: Interior Cleaning
steps.description: Thoroughly wiped down, and deep‑cleaned to leave your boat looking fresh, spotless, and inviting.

steps.title: Complete Interior Cleaning & Exterior Wash
steps.description: A full exterior wash and a thorough interior wipe‑down with deep‑cleaned carpets for a fresh, spotless finish.

steps.title: Additional Detailing Available
steps.description: Need something more specific? Additional cleaning and detailing services are available on request — just ask us what you need.

panel_wash.best_for: Storing a clean boat or picking one up ready for the water
panel_wash.what_to_expect: Drop it off dirty, get it back clean
